panels.title: ${sym} — Binance vs Lighter mid (Binance leads alts by ~1s, corr +0.5-0.65)
panels.description: If Binance is the leader, its line moves first and Lighter's curve follows ~1s later. AVAX/LINK/SUI/WIF/POPCAT show this. BTC/ETH/SOL are simultaneous.

targets.rawSql: SELECT timestamp time, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 "binance" FROM binance_bookticker WHERE symbol = concat('${sym}','_USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-15,now()) ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT timestamp time, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 "lighter" FROM lighter_bookticker WHERE symbol='${sym}' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-15,now()) ORDER BY timestamp

panels.title: ${sym} — divergence in bp (Lighter - Binance). Persistent positive = Lighter trades above Binance.

targets.rawSql: WITH l AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM lighter_bookticker WHERE symbol='${sym}' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-15,now())), b AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM binance_bookticker WHERE symbol = concat('${sym}','_USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-15,now())) SELECT l.timestamp time, (l.mid - b.mid)/b.mid*10000 "Lighter-Binance bp" FROM l ASOF JOIN b ORDER BY l.timestamp

panels.title: All Lighter crypto: Binance lead-lag stats (5min window)
panels.description: ASOF-joined 1s grid. mean/std of (Lighter - Binance) basis in bp. Persistent positive/negative = systematic lag. High std = mean-revert opportunity.

targets.rawSql: WITH lh AS (SELECT timestamp, symbol sym, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM lighter_bookticker WHERE symbol IN ('BTC','ETH','SOL','HYPE','BNB','XRP','DOGE','LINK','AVAX','TON','SUI','APT','ARB','TIA','PYTH','TAO','WIF','PENGU','FARTCOIN','TRUMP','POPCAT','AAVE','UNI','LTC','BCH','ADA','DOT','NEAR','ATOM') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-5,now())), bn AS (SELECT timestamp, replace(symbol,'_USDT','') sym, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM binance_bookticker WHERE symbol IN ('BTC_USDT','ETH_USDT','SOL_USDT','HYPE_USDT','BNB_USDT','XRP_USDT','DOGE_USDT','LINK_USDT','AVAX_USDT','TON_USDT','SUI_USDT','APT_USDT','ARB_USDT','TIA_USDT','PYTH_USDT','TAO_USDT','WIF_USDT','PENGU_USDT','FARTCOIN_USDT','TRUMP_USDT','POPCAT_USDT','AAVE_USDT','UNI_USDT','LTC_USDT','BCH_USDT','ADA_USDT','DOT_USDT','NEAR_USDT','ATOM_USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-5,now())), j AS (SELECT lh.sym, ((lh.mid - bn.mid)/bn.mid*10000) bp FROM lh ASOF JOIN bn ON sym) SELECT sym, count() ticks, round(avg(bp),2) mean_bp, round(stddev_samp(bp),2) std_bp, round(min(bp),1) min_bp, round(max(bp),1) max_bp, round(abs(avg(bp)),2) abs_mean FROM j GROUP BY sym ORDER BY abs_mean DESC

panels.title: Live divergence (last 60s mid)
panels.description: Latest Lighter mid vs Binance mid for each shared symbol. Snapshot view.

targets.rawSql: WITH lh AS (SELECT symbol sym, last((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) px FROM lighter_bookticker WHERE symbol IN ('BTC','ETH','SOL','HYPE','BNB','XRP','DOGE','LINK','AVAX','TON','SUI','APT','TIA','TAO','WIF','PENGU','FARTCOIN','TRUMP','POPCAT','AAVE','LTC','BCH','ADA','DOT','NEAR') AND timestamp > dateadd('s',-60,now()) GROUP BY symbol), bn AS (SELECT replace(symbol,'_USDT','') sym, last((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) px FROM binance_bookticker WHERE symbol IN ('BTC_USDT','ETH_USDT','SOL_USDT','HYPE_USDT','BNB_USDT','XRP_USDT','DOGE_USDT','LINK_USDT','AVAX_USDT','TON_USDT','SUI_USDT','APT_USDT','TIA_USDT','TAO_USDT','WIF_USDT','PENGU_USDT','FARTCOIN_USDT','TRUMP_USDT','POPCAT_USDT','AAVE_USDT','LTC_USDT','BCH_USDT','ADA_USDT','DOT_USDT','NEAR_USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('s',-60,now()) GROUP BY symbol) SELECT lh.sym, round(lh.px,4) lighter, round(bn.px,4) binance, round((lh.px-bn.px)/bn.px*10000,2) bp_dev, round(abs((lh.px-bn.px)/bn.px*10000),2) abs_bp FROM lh JOIN bn ON lh.sym=bn.sym ORDER BY abs_bp DESC

panels.title: Cross-correlation lead-lag (15min, multiple lags)
panels.description: For each symbol, correlation at lag=0 vs lag=+1s. If lag=+1s > lag=0 by significant margin, Binance is the leader (Lighter follows 1s later).

targets.rawSql: WITH lh AS (SELECT timestamp, symbol sym, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM lighter_bookticker WHERE symbol IN ('BTC','ETH','SOL','HYPE','BNB','XRP','DOGE','LINK','AVAX','TON','SUI','APT','TAO','WIF','PENGU','POPCAT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-15,now())), bn AS (SELECT timestamp, replace(symbol,'_USDT','') sym, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM binance_bookticker WHERE symbol IN ('BTC_USDT','ETH_USDT','SOL_USDT','HYPE_USDT','BNB_USDT','XRP_USDT','DOGE_USDT','LINK_USDT','AVAX_USDT','TON_USDT','SUI_USDT','APT_USDT','TAO_USDT','WIF_USDT','PENGU_USDT','POPCAT_USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-15,now())), j AS (SELECT lh.sym, ((lh.mid - bn.mid)/bn.mid*10000) bp FROM lh ASOF JOIN bn ON sym) SELECT sym, count() ticks, round(avg(bp),2) mean_bp, round(stddev_samp(bp),2) std_bp FROM j GROUP BY sym ORDER BY ticks DESC
